.usa-input-error input[type="time"],form .usa-input-error input[type="week"],form .usa-input-error textarea,form .usa-input-error select{width:calc(100% + 1.9rem);margin-right:-1.9rem;border-color:#ff9200}form .usa-input-error{border-left-color:#ff9200}form .usa-input-error .usa-input-error-message{color:#ff9200;font-weight:normal;font-style:italic;font-size:0.9em}form .usa-input-error .usa-input-error-message a{color:#ffaa04}form .usa-input-error .usa-input-error-message .error-item{display:block}form .form-field input[type="password"]{margin-bottom:0.2em}form .combo-field::after{display:none}@media screen and (min-width:600px){form .combo-field::after{display:table}form .combo-field .form-field{margin:0}form .combo-field .form-field>:first-child{margin-top:0}form .combo-field .form-field>:last-child{margin-bottom:0}form .combo-field.combo-error{margin-left:-1.9rem;padding:0.8rem 0 0.8rem 1.5rem;border-left:4px solid #ff9200}form .combo-field.combo-error .form-field label{margin-bottom:0.5rem}form .combo-field .usa-input-error{right:0;padding:0;border:none}form .combo-field.combo-error .usa-input-error label{margin-bottom:0}form .combo-field .usa-input-error input,form .combo-field .usa-input-error textarea,form .combo-field .usa-input-error select{width:100%}}form .form-field label.optional{font-weight:300}form .form-field label.optional .prefix{float:right;font-size:1.3rem;line-height:1;margin:0.6rem 0 0.4rem 1rem}.ga-progress{display:none;position:fixed;z-index:2;right:0;bottom:0;background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);padding:1rem;color:#fff;font-size:1.5rem}.ga-progress .spinner-container{margin-right:0.5rem}.ga-progress canvas{vertical-align:middle}.ncbi-header__account{display:none}input.submit-button{margin-top:0}#icon-section-header{margin-top:0}
